intro_items: to license music for branded content, ads, movies, TV shows or video games? Find all information under “Request music license”.
to sample or remix a song? Find all information under “Sampling, Remixes”.
to cover a song or print lyrics? Please contact the corresponding publisher.
to license music videos or concert clips? Please contact our Business Development Team.
to request an artist for a brand cooperation or a corporate booking event? Please contact our Partnerships team.
about_paragraphs: The Sony Music Licensing Team licenses music so it can be used in ads, movies, TV shows, apps, video games and branded content. Our goal? Clear all the rights as fast as possible and compensate everyone involved fairly.

Sony Music owns rights to millions of songs from over seventy years of music history – from international stars like Elvis Presley, Janis Joplin, AC/DC, Beyoncé, Adele and Miley Cyrus to national artists like Boney M., Mark Forster, Beatrice Egli, Purple Disco Machine, Kamrad and Nina Chuba. To learn more about our artists, please have a look at our artist roster.

sections.title: Request music license
sections.intro:
You would like to license rights to an original recording from the global Sony Music repertoire? Please fill out the form below to request recording rights.

Don’t forget to also request and compensate publishing rights (text and composition). Find the corresponding publisher here.

Very important note: A request alone is no approval for use from our side.

sections.title: Licensing guideline
sections.intro:
You are not sure what you need to take care of when licensing music? We’d like to help you with practical examples and a step-by-step instruction to license and compensate music rights fairly.

Please enter the following information to get access to our Licensing Guide.

sections.title: Sampling/Remixes
sections.intro:
You would like to remix or sample a recording of a Sony Music artist?

If the original recording was published through Sony Music Germany, Austria or Switzerland you can continue below.

If the recording was published in a foreign country, please contact the corresponding Sony Music team.

fields.label: Was the original recording released by Sony Music Entertainment GSA or is it part of the repertoire of another Sony Music Entertainment company?(Required)
Are parts of the original recording used?(Required)

fields.placeholder: Full name and address of the licensee(Required)
Mail address in case of questions(Required)
Name of the artist of the original recording(Required)
In which year was the original recording released?(Required)
Name of the artist of the sample / remix(Required)
Desired title of the new recording(Required)
Link to the demo of the new recording(Required)
Link to the Artist-Profile Spotify / Amazon / Apple / Deezer(Required)
Social Media Link Remixer (TikTok / Insta / Facebook / Youtube etc)(Required)
Sample key data (sample length, vocal passage, repetitions, total running time, etc.)(Required)

fields.label: Are you already in contact with the publisher(s)?(Required)

sections.title: Creative music advice
sections.intro:
You’re working on a film or commercial and are looking for the perfect song? Contact us via sync.de@sonymusic.com with the subject “Briefing”.

Based on the most recent consumer insights, trends and AI-based music search tools we find the perfect song for your message and viewership.

Always stay up to date: Our newsletter provides you with the most recent releases and most exciting music licensing tracks on a monthly basis ->

fields.text: Please note: Registration for our newsletter alone does not guarantee inclusion in our mailing list. We will check your information as soon as possible.
